query:
-- Guest puzzle attempts (no userId, just deviceId)
SELECT deviceId, COUNT(*) AS attempts, SUM(isCorrect) AS correct
FROM puzzle_attempts 
WHERE userId IS NULL AND deviceId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY deviceId
ORDER BY attempts DESC
LIMIT 10;
